You Can Count On

We provide personalized in-home care — trained Alzheimer's and dementia caregivers — structured routines, cognitive stimulation, behavioral management, and family support for families in Deerfield Beach and across Broward County — so your loved ones feel safe, supported, and valued every day.

Why Choose Us?

Care That Comes to You

At Senior Trusted Home Care, we believe everyone deserves to age with dignity in the comfort of their own home. Our personalized care plans let your loved ones thrive.

Compassionate Caregivers

Our caregivers are hand-picked for their warmth, dedication, and genuine compassion. Every interaction is guided by empathy, respect, and a real connection with your loved one.

Comfort of Home

Seniors recover faster and live happier in their own home. We support daily routines, independence, and familiar surroundings — exactly where your loved one wants to be.

Safety & Peace of Mind

All caregivers are licensed, bonded, insured, and background-checked. Medication reminders, safety checks, and real-time family updates keep everyone informed and secure 24/7.

See Our Caregivers In Action

What Quality Home Care Looks Like

Watch how our compassionate caregivers bring comfort, joy, and independence to South Florida families every day.

2 min · Meet our caregivers · See real homes
The Difference

Professional Care vs. Going It Alone

Family caregiving is exhausting. See what professional support can do for your entire family.

Without Professional Care
  • Family caregiver burnout (affects 40%+ of families)
  • Inconsistent care from untrained helpers
  • No training in senior-specific protocols
  • Isolation and loneliness for seniors
  • Higher risk of falls and medication errors
  • Strained family relationships and guilt
  • No coordination or family updates
  • No backup when things go wrong
With Senior Trusted Home Care
  • Trained, background-checked & compassionate caregivers
  • Personalized care plans tailored to your loved one
  • Companionship that reduces isolation & boosts wellbeing
  • Medication reminders & daily safety checks
  • Light housekeeping, meals & personal care covered
  • Regular family updates & transparent communication
  • 24/7 live-in care & on-call support when you need it
0% Family Satisfaction
“Senior Trusted Home Care has been a blessing for our family. Their caregiver treats my mother like her own grandmother — helping with meals, keeping her company, and making sure she takes her medications on time. We finally have peace of mind.”
AJ F. Family Member, West Palm Beach, FL

Get a personalized care plan tailored to your loved one's needs.

Our Home Care Services

Personalized Care for Every Need

From companionship to 24-hour live-in care, we provide the support your loved one needs to live safely and comfortably at home.

★★★★★ Trusted by families across West Palm Beach & South Florida

AHCA Licensed #299996655 · Bonded & Insured · Background Checked

Companionship & Support

Genuine companionship and emotional support to help seniors feel valued, connected, and engaged. Friendly conversations, hobbies, outings, and simply being there to reduce loneliness.

Most Popular

Personal Care

Personalized assistance with bathing, grooming, dressing, toileting, and mobility. Whether a few hours a day or around-the-clock, our team ensures respectful, attentive care tailored to unique needs.

Essential Care

Light Household Help

Light cleaning, laundry, meal preparation, and dishwashing so clients can continue living safely and comfortably at home. We take care of everyday chores so they can focus on health and personal interests.

Daily Living

Medication Reminders & Safety Checks

Timely medication reminders and safety checks to help seniors stay on schedule and maintain a secure living environment. We promote peace of mind for both seniors and their families.

Safety First

Memory Loss Care

Gentle, structured support for individuals living with Alzheimer's or other forms of dementia. We focus on creating a safe, familiar environment while encouraging mental engagement and daily routines.

Specialized

Personal Care in Facilities

Personalized care for residents in assisted living or nursing facilities who need extra support. We work closely with facility staff to deliver companionship and individualized attention.

Facility Support

Post Surgery Care

Smooth, comfortable recovery at home or in a facility. Assistance with mobility, wound care reminders, personal hygiene, and medication support — focused on safety and healing.

Recovery

24-Hour Live-In Care

Continuous support with a dedicated caregiver on-site day and night. Personal care, meals, medication reminders, and emergency assistance — ensuring comfort, consistency, and peace of mind.

24/7 Support
Family Story

From Struggling Alone to Thriving With a Caring Companion

“Mom was isolated and forgetting her medications. Senior Trusted Home Care matched her with a wonderful caregiver who now visits daily. She's eating better, taking her meds on time, and laughing again. It's been life-changing for our whole family.”

The Johnson Family — West Palm Beach, FL

Margaret Johnson, 81, receives daily companionship, medication reminders, light meal preparation, and transportation to doctor's appointments — all coordinated with her family through regular updates from Senior Trusted Home Care.

Getting Started

Your Home Care Journey in 4 Simple Steps

From your first call to your caregiver's first visit — we make it easy.

Day 1

Get In Touch

Call us or fill out our form. We'll listen to your family's needs, answer every question, and explain how we can help — no pressure, no obligation.

1
2
24–48 Hours

Personalized Care Plan

We visit your home to understand daily routines, preferences, and care needs. Together we create a customized care plan that fits your loved one's lifestyle.

48 Hours

Caregiver Matching

We hand-select a trained caregiver matched to your loved one's needs, personality, and language. You meet them before care begins — the right match matters.

3
4
Ongoing

Ongoing Support & Updates

Regular check-ins with your family, care plan adjustments as needs change, and 24/7 on-call support. We adapt care as your loved one's situation evolves.

Transparent Pricing

Estimate Your Home Care Costs

Quality home care is often more affordable than you think — and far less than assisted living facilities. Use the sliders to estimate.

3 days/week
4 hours/day
$30/hr (Companion Care)
$360 Estimated Weekly
$1,560 Estimated Monthly
Save $3,000+/mo vs. Assisted Living Facility

Who We Help

Is Home Care Right for Your Family?

If you or a loved one relates to any of these situations, Senior Trusted Home Care can help.

1

Aging at Home

Your loved one wants to stay in their own home but needs help with daily tasks like bathing, dressing, cooking, or getting around safely.

2

Memory Loss & Alzheimer's

A parent or spouse has been diagnosed with dementia or Alzheimer's and needs patient, structured support with daily routines, safety, and companionship.

3

Post-Surgery Recovery

Recovering from surgery or a hospital stay and needing help with mobility, meals, medication reminders, and getting to follow-up appointments.

4

Family Caregiver Burnout

You're caring for a loved one and need respite — a few hours a week, overnight support, or full-time live-in care so you can rest and recharge.

Not Sure? Let's Talk Free
Family Testimonials

What Families Are Saying

Real stories from real South Florida families who trust Senior Trusted Home Care with their loved ones.

★★★★★

“Senior Trusted Home Care has been a lifesaver. Their caregiver is kind, patient, and treats my mother like family. Mom looks forward to her visits every day — she's happier and more active than she's been in years.”

Jennifer R. Daughter, West Palm Beach, FL
★★★★★

“After Dad's hip surgery, we needed someone reliable to help him at home. The caregiver they matched us with was incredible — helped with meals, medication reminders, and gentle exercises. Dad recovered ahead of schedule.”

Carlos M. Son, Boca Raton, FL
★★★★★

“My husband has early-stage Alzheimer's and I was exhausted trying to do everything myself. Senior Trusted Home Care gave me my life back. Their memory care aide is patient, warm, and knows exactly how to redirect him when he gets confused.”

Patricia G. Wife & Caregiver, Delray Beach, FL
Common Questions

Home Care FAQ

How quickly can home care services begin?

In most cases, we can have a caregiver in your home within 24–48 hours of your initial consultation. For urgent situations, same-day placement may be available.

What qualifications do your caregivers have?

All our caregivers undergo thorough background checks (Level 2 FBI/FDLE), are bonded and insured, and complete specialized training in senior care, Alzheimer's & dementia support, fall prevention, and first aid. We hire for both skill and heart.

How much does home care cost?

Costs depend on the level and frequency of care. Companion care starts around $25–30/hour, while personal care and memory care ranges from $30–45/hour. We offer flexible schedules — from a few hours a week to 24/7 live-in care. We'll provide a transparent quote after your initial consultation.

Do you accept insurance or long-term care policies?

We accept most long-term care insurance policies and can help you navigate the claims process. We also accept private pay and some Medicaid waiver programs. Our team will verify your benefits and explain coverage before services begin.

Can I choose or change my caregiver?

Absolutely. We carefully match caregivers based on your loved one's needs, personality, and language preferences. If for any reason the match isn't right, we'll find a better fit at no additional cost — your family's comfort is our priority.

What areas do you serve?

We serve West Palm Beach and surrounding Palm Beach County communities including Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach, Wellington, Jupiter, and more. We also serve parts of Broward and Miami-Dade County. Call us to confirm coverage in your area.

What if we only need help a few hours a week?

That's perfectly fine! We offer flexible scheduling — from just a few hours of companionship per week to full-time 24-hour live-in care. There are no long-term contracts, and you can adjust the schedule as your needs change.

Do your caregivers speak Spanish or Creole?

Yes! South Florida is wonderfully diverse, and so is our team. We have caregivers fluent in Spanish, Haitian Creole, Portuguese, and other languages. We match language preferences whenever possible to ensure clear communication and comfort.
